subject: Re: Tibby Blum
body:
is there a contact person...?or anyone to call

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

> Spoke to Tibby today and he told me that the 14 day
> expedited processing  
> period applicable to Nadia's H-1B application does
> not begin to run until the  
> date that the correct supplemental data form was
> submitted to Immigration.   
> However, Tibby was quick to point out that because
> the application has already  
> been reviewed, it may have been adjudicated pending
> receipt of the correct  
> supplemental data form, in which case processing
> will likely be completed within  
> less time than 14 days after receipt of the correct
> supplemental data  form.  
>  
> The Supplemental Data Form was sent federal express
> for Tuesday delivery so  
> the 14 day period will have begun on Tuesday,
> December 6 and the  application 
> should have been adjudicated by December 20, 2005.  
>  
> Darren
>

body_html:
is there a contact person...?or anyone to call

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

Spoke to Tibby today and he told me that the 14 day
expedited processing
period applicable to Nadia's H-1B application does
not begin to run until the
date that the correct supplemental data form was
submitted to Immigration.
However, Tibby was quick to point out that because
the application has already
been reviewed, it may have been adjudicated pending
receipt of the correct
supplemental data form, in which case processing
will likely be completed within
less time than 14 days after receipt of the correct
supplemental data form.

The Supplemental Data Form was sent federal express
for Tuesday delivery so
the 14 day period will have begun on Tuesday,
December 6 and the application
should have been adjudicated by December 20, 2005.

Darren
